lines.text: There you are. [warmly] No, don't get up, please, you came all this way for us.
(then) [chuckles] How's the boy. He still building the little ones out of soup cans?
Thank you. Everybody, sit down, please. I'll keep it short. [chuckles] I always say that and I never do it, so.
(then) Tonight a rocket rises with no flag on its side. [pause] Think of that. Not conquest. Not pride. Repair.
All stations, we're inside two minutes. [pause] Give me a go or a no-go for launch.
(then) Hum's up. [pause] Right on the minute.
(into mic) [excited] Look at her. Years from now you'll tell them you stood here the night we sent one up clean, nothing painted on her, nothing to—
Good climb, straight up the range, everything looking nominal on the ascent.
(then) We're seeing something come off the vehicle now, [pause] the outer skin is peeling back along the whole body, stand by.
(then) There's color under the white now. Red, white and blue. That's... [pause] folks, that's our flag on the side of her.
[slowly] There she goes here in a minute. Ours. Whatever it is they got riding her.
Booster's down and safe on the legs, pad one.
(low) [quietly] Engine's out. We're floating now. That's orbit.
